title: galium pumilum subsp. alpestre
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. alpestre is a subspecies of the Galium pumilum plant, a type of flowering plant in the bedstraw family, known for its small white flowers and distinctive appearance. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Galium pumilum subsp. alpestre include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of fever. Galium pumilum subsp. alpestre can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
